calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, August 27, 2015 in Department 525:
Chris Wimmer, Esq. (415-894-9284), specially appearance, for Appellant/Defendant Sunny Kwon who is also present and Danny Kwon, son, as Korean interpreter.
Alexander Perlov and Liliya Litvak, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear as Propria Persona.

The clerk administers the interpreter's oath to Danny Kwon to translate the English language into Korean language and vice versa.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Plaintiffs/Respondents, Alexander Perlov and Liliya Litvak testifies on their own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibit Not Marked - Video taping of the roof in IPad, letter, and pictures.

Mr. Wimmer cross examines Mr. Perlov and Mrs. Litvak on behalf of Appellant/Defendant.
Mr. Perlov cross examines Mr. Kwon.

Mr. Wimmer examines Mr. Kwon through his interpreter Danny Kwon
and Mr. Kwon responds to the questions from the Court through interpreter Danny Kwon. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit not marked - proposal & contract, copy of roofing rule.

Closing argument presented by Mr. Perlov.
Closing argument presented by Counsel Mr. Kimmer on behalf of the Appellant/Defendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court except the IPad and pictures are in the possession of the Respondents/Plaintiffs.

Judge Pro Tem David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Judgment Entered
